activityLogWindow.note: Window ends at last LOGGED event. The lesson-harvester (last-spawned agent) starts ~16s after window close, so the scorer must not require full agent-coverage; it scores on in-window evidence (F2/R-B).

dirMtimeMustNotResolve.note: b5bf91de dir mtime (16:42) precedes the fixture window (17:23-17:37) and the session spans days; a dir-mtime resolver must NOT pick it. Line-timestamps are the load-bearing signal (F2).
